Welcome to the Team!

Time to meet your manager

Hi {{name}},

We're thrilled to have you as part of our team! As the next step in your onboarding journey, we're excited to introduce you to your reporting manager.

What's Next:

Your manager's contact details and introduction information are now available in your dashboard.

They're looking forward to connecting with you and helping you settle into your new role.

View Manager Details

Your manager will be your primary point of contact for role-specific guidance, team integration, and ongoing support. We encourage you to reach out and schedule an introductory meeting at your earliest convenience.

Once again, welcome to the team!
